examples: It was built by Portsmouth Dockyard, and its keel laid in January 1912.
A spokesman for the dockyard said they hoped to launch the first submarine within two years.
According to the operation of the dockyard and the structure of ship lift harbor, open scheme of ship lift harbor was applied.
The ship was refitted at Chatham Dockyard and served out the war as a training vessel.
